zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Elisabeth Flydane Duchess of Ashford於1488年出生在英國肯特阿福德時，她的父親F Flydane20歲，母親Mrs F Flydane21歲。她於1510年之前與Sir Richard Osbourne Knight在英國英格蘭肯特結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1524年11月1日在她的家鄉享年36歲，埋葬在英國肯特阿福德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Elisabeth Flydane Duchess of Ashford于1488年出生在英国肯特阿福德时，她的父亲F Flydane20岁，母亲Mrs F Flydane21岁。她于1510年之前与Sir Richard Osbourne Knight在英国英格兰肯特结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1524年11月1日在她的家乡享年36岁，埋葬在英国肯特阿福德。

nameMeanings.name: Elisabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

variants.name: Elizabeth
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Elisabeth Flydane Duchess of Ashford was born in 1488, in Ashford, Kent, England, her father, F Flydane, was 20 and her mother, Mrs F Flydane, was 21. She married Sir Richard Osbourne Knight before 1510, in Kent, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 1 November 1524, in her hometown, at the age of 36, and was buried in Ashford, Kent, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Elisabeth Flydane Duchess of Ashford est née en 1488, à Ashford, Kent, Angleterre, son père, F Flydane, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Mrs F Flydane, avait 21 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Richard Osbourne Knight avant 1510, à Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 1 novembre 1524, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 36 ans, et a été enterrée à Ashford, Kent, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Elisabeth Flydane Duchess of Ashford 1488 in Ashford, Kent, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater F Flydane 20 und ihre Mutter Mrs F Flydane 21. Sie hat vor 1510 in Kent, England, United Kingdom Sir Richard Osbourne Knight geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 1. November 1524 im Alter von 36 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in Ashford, Kent, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Elisabeth Flydane Duchess of Ashford è nata il nel 1488 nel Ashford, Kent, England, sua padre, F Flydane, aveva 20 anni e sua madre, Mrs F Flydane, aveva 21 anni. Lei sposato Sir Richard Osbourne Knight prima del 1510, nel Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 1 novembre 1524, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 36 anni, e fu sepolta a Ashford, Kent, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Elisabeth Flydane Duchess of Ashfordが1488年にイギリスケントアシュフォードで生まれた時，父F Flydaneは20歳，母Mrs F Flydaneは21歳であった。1510年以前にイギリスイギリスケントでSir Richard Osbourne Knightと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1524年11月1日に故郷で36歳で死去し，イギリスケントアシュフォードにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Elisabeth Flydane Duchess of Ashford(이)가 1488년 영국 켄트 애스h퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 F Flydane(은)는 20세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mrs F Flydane(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 1510년 이전 영국 잉글랜드 켄트에서 Sir Richard Osbourne Knight(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1524년 11월 1일 그녀의 고향에서 36세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 켄트 애스h퍼드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Elisabeth Flydane Duchess of Ashford nasceu em 1488, em Ashford, Kent, Inglaterra, seu pai, F Flydane, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Mrs F Flydane, tinha 21 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Richard Osbourne Knight antes 1510, em Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1 de novembro de 1524, em sua cidade natal, com 36 anos, e foi sepultada em Ashford, Kent, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Elisabeth Flydane Duchess of Ashford родилась в 1488 г. в местности ашфорд, кэнт, Англия, её отцу по имени F Flydane было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs F Flydane, 21. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Richard Osbourne Knight перед 1510 г. в местности кэнт, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 1 дочь. Она умерла 1 ноября 1524 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 36 лет и была похоронена в местности ашфорд, кэнт, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Elisabeth Flydane Duchess of Ashford nació en 1488, en Ashford, Kent, Inglaterra, su papá, F Flydane, tenía 20 años y su mamá, Mrs F Flydane, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Sir Richard Osbourne Knight antes de 1510, en Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 1 de noviembre de 1524, en su pueblo, a la edad de 36 años, y fue sepultada en Ashford, Kent, Inglaterra.
